vBRIEFInfo.author: agent:claude-opus-4.8
vBRIEFInfo.description: Scope vBRIEF: add NWS tornado watch/warning alerts alongside thunderstorm alerts by generalizing the alert model to severe weather

narratives.Overview: Extends the NWS alerts feature (PR #29) so the ride screen also surfaces active tornado watches and warnings, not just thunderstorms. The alert model is generalized from thunderstorm-only to a severe-weather model with a category (thunderstorm | tornado) and level (watch | warning).
narratives.Problem: Tornadoes are the most dangerous severe-weather hazard for a rider, but the app currently only flags thunderstorm watches/warnings.
narratives.Goals:
1. Detect active tornado watches and warnings from NWS.
2. Show them with a tornado icon and text on the main screen.
3. Rank alerts so the most dangerous active alert is shown (warnings over watches; within a level, tornado over thunderstorm).
narratives.FunctionalRequirements:
FR-1: The NWS mapper MUST detect tornado watches and warnings in addition to thunderstorm watches/warnings, ignoring canceled and non-watch/warning events.
FR-2: When multiple alerts are active, the displayed alert MUST be the highest priority, where warning > watch and, within a level, tornado > thunderstorm.
FR-3: A tornado alert MUST render with a tornado icon distinct from the thunderstorm icon.
FR-4: Existing thunderstorm behavior MUST be preserved.
narratives.Architecture: Generalize ThunderstormAlert into SevereWeatherAlert(category, level, event) with a combined priority (level.priority*10 + category.priority). NWSAlertMapper classifies events into tornado/thunderstorm and watch/warning and selects the highest priority. Rename the controller/banner/provider method to severe-weather naming. The banner picks its SF Symbol from the category (tornado -> "tornado", thunderstorm -> "cloud.bolt.rain.fill") and color from the level (warning red, watch amber).
narratives.TestingStrategy: Unit-test the mapper for: tornado warning beats thunderstorm warning; tornado warning beats tornado watch; tornado watch vs thunderstorm warning (warning wins); tornado watch detected; canceled tornado ignored; plus the existing thunderstorm cases. Update controller tests to the new type. Banner presentation verified by build + on-device review.

narrative.Acceptance: SevereWeatherAlert carries category (thunderstorm|tornado) and level (watch|warning) with a combined priority; covered by unit tests.

items.title: Detect tornado alerts in the NWS mapper

narrative.Acceptance: The mapper classifies tornado and thunderstorm watches/warnings and returns the highest-priority active alert.
An active tornado alert renders with a tornado icon and its text, colored by severity.
